WH Mutant Powers 
Inthe first edition, most mutant powers were much less powerful than the ones in the sec- cond edition, We merged a bunch of older powers into more powerful new ones (like 
PARANOIA 
Telepathic Sense and Telepathic Projection become Telepathy), and we deleted some of the lamer ones. Some older adventures men- tion powers no longer included in the game.
